ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading card */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set the card belongs to */,
  "full_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the full-sized image of the card */,
  "is_foil" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is a foil version */,
  "lowest_price" REAL /* Lowest price available for the card */,
  "lowest_price_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor offering the lowest price */,
  "best_vendor_buylist" TEXT /* Best vendor for purchasing the card */,
  "best_vendor_buylist_price" REAL /* Price from the best vendor */,
  "card_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card */,
  "is_promo" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is a promotional card */,
  "is_reprint" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is a reprint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the price change record */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card ID */,
  "absolute_change_since_one_week_ago" REAL /* Absolute price change since one week ago */,
  "absolute_change_since_yesterday" REAL /* Absolute price change since yesterday */,
  "percentage_change_since_one_week_ago" REAL /* Percentage price change since one week ago */,
  "percentage_change_since_yesterday" REAL /* Percentage price change since yesterday */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of price change (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price change occurred */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Market trend of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "url" TEXT /* Website URL of the vendor */,
  "vendor_type" TEXT /* Type of vendor (e.g., online, offline, both) */,
  "shipping_policy" TEXT /* Shipping policy of the vendor (e.g., free shipping, paid shipping) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the vendor (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vendor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vendor was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card ID */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card available in inventory */,
  "count_for_trade" INTEGER /* Count of the card available for trading */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in stock, out of stock, backorder) */,
  "inventory_location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the card set */,
  "set_url" TEXT /* URL for the card set */,
  "set_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the set */,
  "set_type" TEXT /* Type of set (e.g., expansion, core set, promotional set) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the set was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card being traded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade occurred */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, trade) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., buyer, seller, admin) */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, trade) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., view, trade, purchase) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Additional information about the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
